synthesis_output.summary: Acme Roofing tracks 1,247 organic keywords driving an estimated 6,800 monthly visits, with the /services page carrying 18% of that organic traffic. Customer reputation is strong — 187 reviews averaging 4.3/5 across google and productreview, dominant theme 'fast service', positive sentiment 78%. The competitive landscape is dominated by roofright.com.au, which outranks Acme on 124 shared commercial keywords with ~3.2x organic traffic. Workplace signals are a quiet asset: employer-brand health score 72/100 with an improving trend — culture is a credible employer-brand differentiator vs typical trade competitors.

bullets.text: Tracks 1,247 organic keywords driving ~6,800 monthly visits — top page /services carries 18% of organic traffic. (Source: keyword_profile)
187 customer reviews across google + productreview averaging 4.3/5 with 78% positive sentiment, dominant theme 'fast service'. (Source: review_intelligence)
Employer-brand health score 72/100 trending improving across seek + indeed; top pros 'flexible hours' + 'training opportunities'. (Source: workplace_intelligence)
Top competitor roofright.com.au runs 8,400 organic keywords + 56 paid keywords — outranks on 124 shared keywords with ~3.2x organic traffic. (Source: competitor_intelligence)
Backlink profile: 4,200 total backlinks across 287 referring domains, follow_ratio 0.78, toxic 4.2% — moderate authority with low risk. (Source: backlink_intelligence)

strengths.text: Ranks #5 for 'roof leak detection' (search_volume 880, traffic_pct 22% — high commercial intent buyer foothold).
Customer reviews average 4.3/5 across 187 reviews on google + productreview, with 78% positive sentiment and dominant theme 'fast service'.
Employer-brand health score 72/100 with trend 'improving' — culture differentiator vs typical trade competitors.

weaknesses.text: Ranks #47 for 'roofing repair sydney' (search_volume 2,400/mo) — major commercial-intent gap, not capturing local intent traffic.
12% negative sentiment in reviews concentrated around 'communication' theme on productreview (45 review subset).
Staff-review concern theme 'salary below market' surfaces in 2 of 3 cross-platform top cons — retention risk.

opportunities.text: Competitor roofright.com.au runs 56 paid keywords; capture share-of-voice on 'emergency roof repair' (search_volume 1,100, our paid rank 2 already).
sydneyroof.com.au runs zero paid ads (Ad=0) — open paid-search lane for 'commercial roofing' clusters they organic-rank for.
Workplace 'flexible hours' + 'training opportunities' top-pros position as employer of choice in trades — hire-led growth lever.

threats.text: roofright.com.au outranks you on 124 shared keywords with ~3.2x your organic traffic (Or=8,400 vs your top 1,247).
Toxic backlinks at 4.2% of profile — moderate risk of algorithmic penalty if not disavowed.
Staff-cons theme 'limited advancement' and 'salary below market' indicate churn risk — competitor-side hiring pressure.

quick_wins.text: Optimise /services page (currently 18% of organic traffic, top page) for 'commercial roofing' (rank 12, SV 1,800) — title + H1 + schema fixes.
Respond publicly to the 12% negative-sentiment reviews on productreview (45 reviews, theme 'communication') — closes the loop on the dominant negative theme.
Pilot a paid ad on 'roofing repair sydney' (SV 2,400, currently rank 47 organically) — buy traffic while organic catches up.

priorities.text: Build out a content cluster around 'roof leak detection' (current rank #5, SV 880, traffic_pct 22%) — supporting articles to lift cluster traffic 30-50%.
Drive review velocity on google (142 → 200) by post-job SMS prompt — build moat vs roofright.com.au at 0% review velocity advantage to date.
Reallocate paid budget from current 22 keywords ($4,400) toward the open lane sydneyroof.com.au cedes (Ad=0) — measure CPL by cluster.

strategic.text: Close the 6,800 → 22,000 organic_traffic gap vs roofright.com.au by 12-month keyword build-out targeting their 124 shared-keyword overlap.
Launch employer-brand campaign tied to 'flexible hours' + 'training' top-pros — convert 72/100 employer_brand_health_score into hire-rate uplift.
Expand referring_domains (currently 287) to 500+ via 12-month authority play — close the gap implied by competitive organic_traffic delta.

competitors.name: roofright.com.au
competitors.comparative_positioning: Outranks Acme on 124 shared commercial keywords with ~3.2x your organic traffic and an active 56-keyword paid programme.

competitors.name: sydneyroof.com.au
competitors.comparative_positioning: Outranks on 78 shared keywords with ~1.8x organic traffic but runs zero paid ads — leaves an open paid-search lane.

competitors.name: topnotchroofing.com.au
competitors.comparative_positioning: Mid-tier organic footprint (~1.2x your traffic) with active paid; competes on the same commercial-intent cluster.

top_themes.example_quote: Got my roof repair done in 2 days, great work.
Fair price, professional team — would use again.
Communication could be quicker but quality is solid.
